project.name: DevKey
project.description: Open-source Android keyboard combining Hacker's Keyboard power-user features with modern SwiftKey-inspired UX, AI prediction, and command-aware autocorrect

current_phase.name: Session 1 Complete — Ready for Session 2
current_phase.details: Infrastructure & project scaffolding done. Project builds. Ready for Session 2: Keyboard Layout & Rendering.

phases.name: Session 4: AI Prediction, Command Mode & Voice

metadata.session_notes: Session 5: Implemented Session 1 plan. Cloned HK, repackaged to dev.devkey.keyboard, Kotlin DSL build, Room database (5 tables), migrated Keyboard.kt + KeyboardSwitcher.kt, created ARCHITECTURE.md. Build successful.
